subject: biology
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ2.20
question_html:
What is required for natural selection to occur?

I. Acquired characteristics

II. Advantageous characteristics

III. Genetic variation

A. I only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III
examiners_html: The answers to this question show poor knowledge of the requirements for natural selection, as many candidates believed acquired characteristics are needed.
